scope.target: Expand canonical skill specs to the remaining primary repository skills
constraints: Do not duplicate full skill bodies into canonical metadata
Keep canonical skill specs concise and portable
non_goals: No runtime wrappers in this stage
No generator/export scripts in this stage

inputs.architecture_target: Make the repository's main skills portable through canonical skill specs before expanding Codex runtime wrappers
user_constraints: Organize the remaining skills after proving the first pilot
Avoid creating a second full source of truth

steps: Mapped the remaining skill folders to canonical skill specs
Recorded human guide and reference paths for each skill
Recorded Codex runtime wrapper targets for the remaining skills
validation: Each primary skill now has a canonical skill.yaml
Each canonical skill spec points to concrete references and guides in the repository
deferred_items: Create Codex runtime wrappers for the remaining skills
Decide whether canonical references should later be migrated out of Claude-specific paths

results.summary: Expanded canonical skill specs to the remaining primary skills.
